name: Naloxone
description: I-opioid receptor antagonist ekhuphisanayo. Ibuyisela ngokukhawuleza ukudakumba okubangelwa yi-opioid, i-sedation, kunye ne-analgesia. Ukuqalisa IV: 2 min, IM: 5 min, IN: 8-13 min. Ubude bexesha bufutshane kunee-opioids ezininzi -- ukuphinda ithamo kungafuneka.
dose: 0.4-2 mg IV/IO/IM/IN. Phinda u-q2-3 min njengoko kufuneka. Ubuninzi 10mg. Intranasal (IN): 2mg ngempumlo nganye.
warnings: Ubude bexesha lesenzo (30-90 min) lifutshane kunee-opioids ezininzi -- isigulana sinokuphinda sisebenzise i-narcotic. Beka esweni ubuncinane iyure eyi-1 emva kwedosi yokugqibela.
Ukunciphisa ukurhoxiswa kwe-opioid-kunokubangela ukuphazamiseka, i-tachycardia, i-pulmonary edema kwizigulana ezixhomekeke kwi-opioid.
Iza kuyibuyisela umva i-analgesia -- isigulana sinokulwa ngokugqithisileyo kwiintlungu.

pediatric.dose: 0.01 mg / kg IV / IM / IN (max 0.4 mg). Phinda u-q2-3 min PRN.
pediatric.note: Umntwana osandul' ukuzalwa: i-0.01 mg/kg yokuguqulwa kwe-opioid kamama.

obstetric.note: Ikhuselekile ekukhulelweni. Ukuba inikwe umama xa sele eza kubeleka, jonga umntwana osanda kuzalwa ukuba uyarhoxa.
